successScreen.title: You're in!
successScreen.description: Congratulations on enrolling in the Frontend Engineer Program! We're thrilled to have you on board and can't wait to see you thrive in your frontend journey. Check your email for next steps and get ready to start learning!

features.whatsappGroupDescription: We'll send you the group link within 24 hours

features.courseStartsSoonDescription: Get ready — your frontend journey begins here!
